components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Compact primary action for operator workflows.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { height: 32px; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 8px; background: var(--primary); color: var(--primary-foreground); padding: 0 10px; font: 500 14px/1 var(--font-body); transition: background-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.33, 1, 0.68, 1), transform 150ms cubic-bezier(0.33, 1, 0.68, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: color-mix(in oklch, var(--primary) 82%, transparent); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px color-mix(in oklch, var(--ring) 50%, transparent); }

components.name: Default Input
components.description: Compact field for filters and forms.
components.css: .ds-input { height: 32px; width: 220px; border: 1px solid var(--input); border-radius: 8px; background: transparent; color: var(--foreground); padding: 0 10px; font: 400 14px/1.4 var(--font-body); transition: border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.33, 1, 0.68, 1), box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.33, 1, 0.68, 1); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: var(--muted-foreground); } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: var(--ring); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px color-mix(in oklch, var(--ring) 50%, transparent); }

components.name: Operations Card
components.description: Flat product panel for dense status and table-adjacent information.
components.css: .ds-card { border-radius: 12px; background: var(--card); color: var(--card-foreground); padding: 16px; box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px color-mix(in oklch, var(--foreground) 10%, transparent); font-family: var(--font-body); } .ds-card h3 { margin: 0; font-size: 16px; line-height: 1.35; font-weight: 600; } .ds-card p { margin: 8px 0 0; color: var(--muted-foreground); font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.5; }

narrative.overview: New API should look like a precise operations ledger for model and tool infrastructure. The current visual system is restrained: neutral surfaces, Public Sans typography, compact controls, shadcn/base-ui primitives, and state colors reserved for actual system meaning.
keyCharacteristics: Neutral, high-contrast surfaces with semantic status color.
Compact controls with stable heights and predictable focus states.
Tables, tabs, filters, menus, and detail panels as first-class patterns.
Motion that explains navigation or state only.

rules.name: The Semantic Color Rule
rules.body: Status color is for system meaning only. Do not use green, amber, red, or blue as decoration.

rules.name: The Fixed Scale Rule
rules.body: Product UI uses fixed rem sizes, not viewport-fluid type. Large display type belongs to public pages only.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Do not pair broad soft shadows with 1px borders on ordinary cards. If a surface needs separation, choose a ring or a tonal layer.

dos: Do keep operator pages dense, scannable, and aligned to standard product affordances.
Do reserve semantic colors for health, risk, and state.
Do provide loading, empty, partial, error, and permission states for v2 pilot surfaces.
Do keep current web/classic and current web/default routes reversible while v2 is a pilot.
donts: Don't use giant hero panels, marketing dashboard composition, or novelty AI cockpit visuals in authenticated product routes.
Don't use purple-blue gradient branding, gradient text, glassmorphism, or decorative card grids.
Don't invent custom controls where standard tabs, tables, switches, menus, and detail panels fit.
Don't hide risk or billing impact away from the action that creates it.
